metadata.description: Unified status line for Claude Code with multi-CLI (Claude, Codex, Gemini, z.ai) usage monitoring, context, rate limits, and cost tracking

plugins.name: claude-dashboard
plugins.description: Real-time status line showing model, context, color-coded progress bar, cost, API rate limits (5h/7d), and unified usage tracking for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and z.ai CLIs. Supports Max/Pro plans with i18n (English/Korean).
